basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Madras is recruiting 1 Project Engineer on purely contract basis for road safety related work.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | preferred: Bachelors/Masters/PhD in Civil/Transportation Engineering, knowledge of road design software | job responsibilities: Road safety audits, blackspot analysis, field surveys, training stakeholders, report preparation

salary_details.details: Pay: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month (based on experience)

how_to_apply: Check Advertisement No. 136/2026 and submit the online application.
Fill separate application if applying for multiple posts.
Keep a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: All positions are on purely contract basis. No claim for regular appointment or extension. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions. Hard copy of application is NOT to be sent. Correspondence will be made through email only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Madras Project Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online application is 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Engineer at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month depending on experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the essential qualification for IIT Madras Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: B.E / B.Tech or equivalent with 2+ years experience in Road Safety Audit.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: Only 01 vacancy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Project Engineer contract at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: Initially one year, later extendable based on performance.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Madras Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: Apply online through the official portal https://icandsr.iitm.ac.in/careers/current_openings.php using Advt. No. 136/2026.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key responsibilities for IIT Madras Project Engineer?
faq.answer: Road safety audits, blackspot analysis, field surveys, stakeholder training, and report compilation.

faq.question: Q8. Is the IIT Madras Project Engineer position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely on contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the Co-ordinator for the Project Engineer position at IIT Madras?
faq.answer: Prof. Venkatesh Balasubramanian, Department of Engineering Design.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any interview for IIT Madras Project Engineer selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called as per the selection process mentioned in the advertisement.
